payload.title: [CRITICAL] Path traversal / arbitrary file write via unvalidated event id
payload.description: validateEvent (src/event-schema.js:108) accepts any non-empty string as evt.id; appendEvent (src/event-store.js:51) writes join(dir, `${event.id}.json`) using it raw. A tenant member POSTs /api/sync/push with id='../../../../tmp/pwn' (or '../<other-tenant>/.scope/events/<ulid>'); it passes validation + actor authz, lands in PG, then every replica refresh calls appendEvent on the hub FS -> writes outside the events dir => cross-tenant event injection + arbitrary .json write. Also hits the LAN push path. FIX: validate evt.id as a strict ULID (/^[0-7][0-9A-HJKMNP-TV-Z]{25}$/) in validateEvent; defense-in-depth basename/.. guard + resolve-within-dir assert in appendEvent.
